clean_story:
Now I will teach you Love.

Love is warm like sun on cold skin, but inside. It makes belly soft when other near—like fire not for cook, but for sit close, no need words. When you see one and breath sticks, hands want to hold, eyes forget blink—that is Love. If they hurt, you hurt; if they laugh, your chest jumps like first meat after long hunger. You do stupid things—give best berries, stand between them and beast, wake early just to watch them sleep. Love is the thing that makes alone feel like wrong. This is Love.
